summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are classified independently; no close, merge, fix, or security route is planned. Five job candidates were not present in the hydrated preflight artifact, so those specific refs need human follow-up or rehydration before classification.
